semantic.role: CLI command adapter for the God Mode feature, handling user warnings and confirmation before delegating to the God engine.
responsibilities: Defines the ExecuteGodCommandOptions interface to pass command arguments and root directory.
Logs warnings about God Mode being non-production and its overwrite behavior.
Checks for the --force flag to skip interactive confirmation.
Prompts the user for explicit confirmation via promptForExplicitConfirmation.
Delegates execution to runGodMode engine upon confirmation.
Logs cancellation message if user declines.
Catches errors from the engine and logs them.
outOfScope: Business logic of God Mode beyond command initiation.
Direct file I/O or database operations.
invariants: [Rule: cli-entrypoint-separation] - This module must remain a thin command adapter; it must not absorb pipeline or persistence logic.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a CLI-accessible gateway to the God Mode engine, enforcing user warnings and consent before proceeding.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of ArchSpine v1.0.0 governance release; no code changes detected for this file.

English.role: CLI command adapter for the God Mode feature, handling user warnings and confirmation before delegating to the God engine.
responsibilities: Defines the ExecuteGodCommandOptions interface to pass command arguments and root directory.
Logs warnings about God Mode being non-production and its overwrite behavior.
Checks for the --force flag to skip interactive confirmation.
Prompts the user for explicit confirmation via promptForExplicitConfirmation.
Delegates execution to runGodMode engine upon confirmation.
Logs cancellation message if user declines.
Catches errors from the engine and logs them.
outOfScope: Business logic of God Mode beyond command initiation.
Direct file I/O or database operations.

Simplified Chinese.role: God Mode 功能的 CLI 命令适配器，负责处理用户警告和确认，然后将控制权委托给 God 引擎。
responsibilities: 定义 ExecuteGodCommandOptions 接口以传递命令参数和根目录。
记录 God Mode 非生产环境及其覆盖行为的警告。
检查 --force 标志以跳过交互式确认。
通过 promptForExplicitConfirmation 提示用户进行显式确认。
在确认后委托 runGodMode 引擎执行。
如果用户取消则记录取消消息。
捕获引擎的错误并记录它们。
outOfScope: 超出命令初始化的 God Mode 业务逻辑。
直接文件 I/O 或数据库操作。
